title: Reload or respawn only the resolved Pi process
invariant: Pi lifecycle actions target the current Pi pane safely and require a continuation to prove replacement completion.
sharedInstruction: After Pi package changes, prefer a soft reload; use hard respawn only when needed, resolve the current Pi pane rather than the desktop terminal, and require a continuation as completion proof.
divergenceReason: Claude does not expose Pi extension reload/respawn lifecycle operations.

pi: terminal_current diagnoses desktop terminal attachment; it does not identify the Pi pane.
